# Operations Briefing Smoke Evidence

These files are SMOKE SAMPLE evidence for local verification only.
Replace before operational use.

The live Operations Briefing smoke test uses this folder by default so the model
has concrete, non-sensitive signals to summarize. The desktop app's evidence
template seeding still uses the blank operator templates in
`docs/templates/operations-briefing-evidence`.

The sample scenario is fictional and intentionally small:

- Soft demand in transient rooms, partly offset by corporate base business.
- Lower guest sentiment caused by breakfast queues and elevator wait time.
- One compliance follow-up and one maintenance risk requiring owners.
- Prior actions with clear status so the briefing can produce accountable next
  steps without inventing evidence.
